Interactive App (Shinylive)

Source: vignettes/shinylive.Rmd
shinylive.Rmd

Try monitOS in your browser

The monitOS Shiny app is available as a Shinylive application that runs entirely in your browser using WebAssembly — no R installation or server required.

About Shinylive

Shinylive runs Shiny applications entirely in the browser using WebAssembly via the webR project. This means: - No server required — the app runs on your device - No installation needed — just open the page - Privacy — your inputs never leave your browser

The app implements the same bounds() function available in the R package. For programmatic access, install monitOS from CRAN:

install.packages("monitOS")
library(monitOS)
bounds(
  events = c(60, 89, 110, 131, 178),
  power_int = 0.9,
  falsepos = 0.025,
  hr_null = 1.3,
  hr_alt = 0.8,
  rand_ratio = 1
)

Local Shiny App

If you have R and monitOS installed, you can also run the full Shiny dashboard locally:

monitOS::run_app()

On this page

Developed by Lisa Hampson, Thibaud Coroller, Evanthia Koukouli.
